mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_post WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND menu_key = #{menuKey}
AND template_code = #{templateCode}
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND author_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT post_id, post_uuid, title, content_html, content_text, author_id, menu_key, template_code, parent_id, group_id, depth, order_no, is_secret, password_hash, view_count, status, metadata, summary_text, keywords_json, ai_language_code, ai_ready, is_notice, notice_start_dt, notice_end_dt, is_popup, popup_start_dt, popup_end_dt, popup_link_url, thumbnail_file_id, popup_dismiss_option, created_at, updated_at FROM common_post WHERE post_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE common_post SET view_count = COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE post_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_post ( title, content_html, content_text, author_id, menu_key, template_code, parent_id, group_id, depth, order_no, is_secret, password_hash, status, metadata, is_notice, notice_start_dt, notice_end_dt, is_popup, popup_start_dt, popup_end_dt, popup_link_url, thumbnail_file_id, popup_dismiss_option, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{cont}, #{cont}, #{rqstId}, #{menuKey}, #{templateCode}, #{parentId}, #{groupId}, #{depth}, #{orderNo}, #{secret}, #{passwordHash}, 'PUBLISHED', #{metadata}::jsonb, #{isNotice}, #{noticeStartDt}, #{noticeEndDt}, #{isPopup}, #{popupStartDt}, #{popupEndDt}, #{popupLinkUrl}, #{thumbnailFileId}, #{popupDismissOption}, NOW(), NOW(), FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE common_post SET title = #{title}, content_html = #{cont}, content_text = #{cont}, author_id = #{rqstId}, menu_key = #{menuKey}, template_code = #{templateCode}, is_secret = #{secret}, password_hash = COALESCE(#{passwordHash}, password_hash), metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb, is_notice = #{isNotice}, notice_start_dt = #{noticeStartDt}, notice_end_dt = #{noticeEndDt}, is_popup = #{isPopup}, popup_start_dt = #{popupStartDt}, popup_end_dt = #{popupEndDt}, popup_link_url = #{popupLinkUrl}, thumbnail_file_id = #{thumbnailFileId}, popup_dismiss_option = #{popupDismissOption}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE common_post SET order_no = #{orderNo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE common_post SET thumbnail_file_id = #{fileId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
